ItacPersonItem.Notes: Man of letters, he joined the Ricovrati in 1603 and was Secretary between 1604-1608. He received a degree in law at the University of Padua. Apostolic Prothonotary in dioces in Treviso, Tuscolo, Portuense, Ostia and Velletri, where he revived the Accademia dei Sollevati with the name `dei Riaccesi`. He was member of the Accademia dei Nobili in Padua. In the Incogniti Academy, Costantini delivered two orations (which remained in manuscript) on Vergil`s Georgiche. See his biography by Vera Lettere in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
